promo_banner.message: 30 KD off all invitations for Eid Al Adha!

HomePage.badge: The First Automated Invitation System in the Gulf
HomePage.title: Luxury Invitations, sent in minutes.
HomePage.description: Da3witi lets you send beautiful WhatsApp invitations in minutes. Add your event details, upload your guest list and card, then we handle the sending and RSVP tracking automatically.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Add details, upload guests + card, then send — we’ll track replies.

why_choose_us.title: Why Da3witi
why_choose_us.subtitle_desc: Fully automated. No agents. No calls. Send WhatsApp invites and track RSVPs.

simple_interface.title: Clear & Simple Interface
simple_interface.desc: Create your invitation in just a few clicks. It's that simple.

free_access.title: Free to Start
free_access.desc: You can design and preview your invitation without any upfront cost.

beautiful_designs.title: Personalized to Your Event
beautiful_designs.desc: Your card, your wording, your vibe — it looks premium in minutes.

community.title: Join Our Community
community.subtitle: Create an invite in minutes, send via WhatsApp, and track replies automatically.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions, no hidden fees. Pay once per event.

standard.title: Standard Invite
standard.features_note: Guest limit ({max}) does not include their invitees (plus-ones).

business_cta.title: White-label invite management
business_cta.description: Offer Da3witi under your own brand for venues, event planners, agencies, and businesses that send invitations at scale.

phone_mockup.invite_body: We are pleased to invite you to attend the wedding ceremony of our son Muhammad, next Friday. We look forward to seeing you there.

guests.title: Manage Guests Easily
guests.desc: Import lists from Excel files, categorize guests, and track responses moment by moment.

qr.title: Smart QR Tickets
qr.desc: Send a special QR code for each guest to facilitate entry and organize reception.

automation.title: WhatsApp Automation
automation.desc: Reminder messages before the appointment, location maps, and thank you messages after attendance, all automatically.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.heading: Let's talk
ContactPage.description: Reach out anytime and our team will support you quickly. Choose the channel that works best for you.

email.title: Email Us
email.description: For general questions, partnerships, or account support.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Need a quick answer? Message us directly on WhatsApp.

step1.title: Guest List
step1.desc: Add the people you would like to invite.
step1.optional_note: No worries if your guest list isn't ready, you can skip this step and add guests later from the event page.
step1.upload_text: Click to upload or drag file here
step1.select_both_warning: Please select both Name and Phone columns to continue.
step1.select_all_warning: Please select Name, Phone, and Invite Count columns to continue.

step2.title: Event Details
step2.auto_adds_desc: Guest name, date/time, location, and RSVP buttons. QR and guest count are added automatically if enabled.
step2.full_message_hint: This is the exact text that will be sent (your greeting is highlighted).
step2.event_name_hint: This name is for your reference and will appear in the reminder message
step2.default_message: We are pleased to invite you to attend the wedding ceremony of our son Muhammad, next Friday. We look forward to seeing you there.
step2.qr_desc: A special entry code will be sent to each guest
step2.guests_desc: Allow guests to bring additional invites for friends or family. If disabled, the number of invites isn't specified in the message (assumed to be 1)
step2.reminder_days_option: {count, plural, one {1 day before} other {# days before}}

step2.reminder_requires_calendar: Use the calendar picker for date to enable auto reminders
step2.media_required: Please upload an invitation image or document to continue.

step3.title: Message Preview
step3.desc: This is how the invitation will appear on your guests' phones.
step3.free_create_note: Your event will be created at no cost. You'll only pay when you're ready to send invites from the dashboard.
step3.pay_later_note: You'll pay when you send invites from the dashboard.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.intro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Da3witi. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By creating an account or using Da3witi in any way, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you are using the service on behalf of a business, you represent that you have authority to bind that business to these terms.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Service
sections.body: Da3witi is a WhatsApp-based invitation management platform that allows you to create, send, and track event invitations. The service includes guest list management, RSVP tracking, QR code check-in, and automated messaging features. The service is provided by Dune Technical Services Company for Computer Technology WLL, registered in Kuwait.

sections.heading: 3. User Accounts
sections.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account. We reserve the right to terminate accounts that violate these terms or that have been inactive for an extended period.

sections.heading: 4. Payments and Refunds
sections.body: Service fees are charged per event and are due before sending invitations. All prices are listed in Kuwaiti Dinars (KWD) and are inclusive of applicable taxes. Payments are processed securely through our payment provider. Refunds are not available once invitations have been sent. If technical issues on our end prevent delivery, we will work with you to resolve the issue or issue a credit.

sections.heading: 5. User Content and Conduct
sections.body: You retain ownership of content you upload (invitation cards, guest lists, event details). By uploading content, you grant us a limited license to use it solely for providing the service to you. You must not use Da3witi to send unsolicited messages, spam, or content that is illegal, offensive, or violates any third party's rights. You are solely responsible for obtaining consent from your guests to receive WhatsApp messages.

sections.heading: 6. WhatsApp Compliance
sections.body: Da3witi operates through the official WhatsApp Business API. You agree to comply with WhatsApp's Business Policy and Terms of Service. Sending messages to recipients who have not consented may result in suspension of your account and potential action by WhatsApp.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Da3witi is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the specific event in question. We are not responsible for delays or failures caused by WhatsApp platform outages, network issues, or factors outside our control.

sections.heading: 8. Modifications to Terms
sections.body: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by email or by posting a notice on our website. Continued use of the service after such notice constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.heading: 9. Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Kuwait. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Kuwait.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.body: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at hello@da3witi.com or via WhatsApp at +965 96685677.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: At Da3witi, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your data.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly: your name, email address, and password when you register; event details, guest names, and phone numbers you upload; payment information (processed securely by our payment provider — we do not store card details). We also collect usage data such as pages visited, features used, and device information to improve our service.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to provide and operate the Da3witi service; send WhatsApp invitations to your guests on your behalf; process payments and manage your account; send you service-related communications such as receipts and notifications; improve and develop new features; and comply with legal obligations.

sections.heading: 3. Guest Data
sections.body: Guest names and phone numbers you upload are used solely to deliver invitations for your event. We do not use guest contact information for our own marketing. Guest data is retained for as long as your event is active and deleted upon your request or within 12 months after the event date.

sections.heading: 4. Sharing of Information
sections.body: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with: WhatsApp (Meta) to deliver messages via the Business API; our payment processor to handle transactions; cloud infrastructure providers who process data under strict confidentiality agreements. We may disclose information if required by law or to protect the rights and safety of our users.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
sections.body: Account data is retained as long as your account is active. Event and guest data is retained for 12 months after the event date, after which it is permanently deleted. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.

sections.heading: 6. Data Security
sections.body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. Access to personal data is restricted to authorized personnel only. Despite our efforts, no system is completely secure and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access the personal information we hold about you; correct inaccurate data; request deletion of your account and associated data; withdraw consent for processing where consent is the legal basis. To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@da3witi.com.

sections.heading: 8. Cookies
sections.body: We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and remember your preferences. We do not use third-party advertising cookies. You can control cookie settings through your browser, though disabling essential cookies may affect functionality.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes by email. The date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was last revised.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at hello@da3witi.com or via WhatsApp at +965 96685677. Our address is: Dune Technical Services Company for Computer Technology WLL, Al Qibla, Kuwait.
